safe_claim: Current Linux io_uring source anchors are mapped as request/resource/worker surfaces that require explicit typed CapSched request or registered-resource carriers before receipt consumption.
forbidden_claim: Existing io_kiocb, io_wq_work, req->creds, req->tctx, registered fd/buffer nodes, cancel flags, CQEs, completion, or retry state is caller Domain authority, monitor receipt proof, runtime coverage, behavior approval, or production protection.

source_rows.candidate_role: Central io_uring request object and likely future per-request typed carrier storage point.
source_rows.authority_boundary: current io_kiocb fields are Linux request state, not CapSched receipt authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: io_kiocb existence as typed carrier proof
source_rows.next_step: future design must name exact carrier fields and lifetime in io_kiocb or an attached object

source_rows.candidate_role: Embedded io-wq work item used for offloaded request execution.
source_rows.authority_boundary: io_wq_work list/flags/cancel_seq state is not caller authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: io_wq_work as monitor receipt carrier by default
source_rows.next_step: typed request carrier must be retrieved through containing io_kiocb or explicit wrapper, not generic work identity

source_rows.candidate_role: Registered file/buffer resource node and likely future frozen-resource metadata anchor.
source_rows.authority_boundary: type/ref/tag/file_ptr/buf liveness is not CapSched frozen authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: registered resource node as EndpointCap or receipt authority
source_rows.next_step: future resource carrier must distinguish registration liveness from monitor-backed endpoint authority

source_rows.symbol_or_pattern: static int io_init_req(struct io_ring_ctx *ctx, struct io_kiocb *req,
source_rows.candidate_role: Initial request binding after SQE consumption: ctx, opcode, flags, user_data, tctx, optional creds.
source_rows.authority_boundary: req->tctx and req->creds are Linux execution/request state, not monitor receipt provenance.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: io_init_req success as frozen caller authority
source_rows.next_step: future typed carrier must freeze caller authority before or during this binding and before issue/offload

source_rows.candidate_role: Side-effect boundary that invokes opcode issue logic.
source_rows.authority_boundary: def->issue() must not run caller side effects without typed carrier freshness and service/caller intersection.
source_rows.next_step: future carrier validation must occur before endpoint side effects

source_rows.symbol_or_pattern: static bool io_assign_file(struct io_kiocb *req, const struct io_issue_def *def,
source_rows.candidate_role: Binds normal or fixed file to request before issue.
source_rows.authority_boundary: file lookup is object liveness, not EndpointCap or monitor receipt proof.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: file assignment as object capability authority
source_rows.next_step: future endpoint carrier must wrap or validate file authority separately from lookup

source_rows.symbol_or_pattern: inline struct file *io_file_get_fixed(struct io_kiocb *req, int fd,
source_rows.candidate_role: Looks up fixed file table node and stores req->file_node.
source_rows.authority_boundary: fixed-file registration is not caller frozen authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: registered fd existence as receipt provenance
source_rows.next_step: future registered-resource carrier must freeze authority at registration or explicit update

source_rows.candidate_role: Prepares embedded io_wq_work flags/hash and captures current creds if absent.
source_rows.authority_boundary: cred capture and work flags are Linux execution state, not monitor receipt authority.
source_rows.next_step: future typed carrier must be immutable before io_wq enqueue and independent of worker identity

source_rows.candidate_role: Enqueues &req->work into io-wq for worker execution.
source_rows.authority_boundary: io-wq enqueue is not receipt consumption or generation validation.
source_rows.next_step: future carrier must already be bound before this enqueue or the request must be rejected

source_rows.candidate_role: Worker loop selects work and calls io_wq_submit_work().
source_rows.authority_boundary: worker->cur_work and io-wq worker context are not caller Domain authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: io-wq worker identity as caller provenance
source_rows.next_step: future stale/revoked carrier rejection must occur before io_wq_submit_work side effects

source_rows.candidate_role: Converts io_wq_work back to io_kiocb and issues or retries work.
source_rows.authority_boundary: IO_WQ_WORK_CANCEL is cancellation state, not CapSched revoke generation.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: io_wq_submit_work as service/caller intersection by default
source_rows.next_step: future carrier check must compare monitor receipt/generation before issue

source_rows.candidate_role: Lookup primitive for registered file/buffer nodes.
source_rows.authority_boundary: table lookup proves registration liveness only.
source_rows.next_step: future frozen-resource metadata must be attached and generation-checked explicitly

source_rows.candidate_role: Drops request-held registered resource references during cleanup.
source_rows.authority_boundary: ref release is not monitor revoke completion.
source_rows.next_step: future carrier revoke must order resource refs and monitor receipt invalidation

source_rows.candidate_role: Binds registered buffer node to a request.
source_rows.authority_boundary: registered buffer lookup is not caller frozen memory authority.
source_rows.forbidden_upgrade: registered buffer existence as memory endpoint authority
source_rows.next_step: future buffer carrier must freeze memory authority at registration or explicit update

source_rows.candidate_role: Matches cancellation by Linux request attributes.
source_rows.authority_boundary: ctx/fd/op/user_data/sequence matching is not monitor generation or receipt validity.
source_rows.next_step: future cancel/revoke table must include CapSched generation and monitor receipt invalidation

source_rows.candidate_role: Cancels pending or running io-wq work via callback matching.
source_rows.authority_boundary: IO_WQ_WORK_CANCEL is not monitor revoke completion.
source_rows.next_step: future stale carrier rejection must cover pending, running, linked, retried, and freed request states

source_rows.candidate_role: Final cleanup path for completed or reissued requests.
source_rows.authority_boundary: completion/free is result delivery and memory lifecycle, not monitor receipt proof.
source_rows.next_step: future carrier free must handle receipt ref release without claiming protection

source_rows.candidate_role: Determines reissue eligibility for some read/write requests.
source_rows.authority_boundary: retry or reissue is not renewed receipt authority.
source_rows.next_step: future carrier lifetime must cover reissue without stale authority consumption
